content.summary: Generates gradient ramps (linear, radial, circular) for masks, lookups, and color mapping.

examples.label: Create radial gradient
examples.description: Switch to radial mode for a circular gradient mask.

examples.label: Animate ramp phase
examples.description: Use as a parameter expression on the phase parameter to scroll the gradient.

examples.label: Set ramp period for tiling
examples.description: Tile the ramp 4 times across the image.
